title: Automated Code Completion
scenario: Complete a partially written piece of code in Python that calculates the average of a list of numbers. The output should be a well-structured and complete Python function with proper formatting.
constraints: Must include a docstring with a description.
Must include a return statement with the calculated average.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python code is valid and properly formatted.
Check if the code correctly calculates the average.
Verify that the output meets all specified constraints.
